title: Peek-a-Boo Seasons with Zuri
synopsis: Little Zuri plays peek-a-boo with nature as the seasons change around her favorite tree, discovering spring flowers, summer butterflies, autumn leaves, and winter snow.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is Zuri? Here she is by the big oak tree!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes standing beside a large oak tree in spring with soft pink cherry blossoms, pale green grass, and delicate white flowers scattered around in spring pastels
illustration.alt: Zuri standing next to a blooming oak tree in springtime

pages.text: Spring is here! Pink flowers bloom. Peek-a-boo behind the blossoms!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes peeking from behind pink spring blossoms on the same oak tree, surrounded by soft pastel colors and new green leaves
illustration.alt: Zuri hiding behind spring blossoms on the oak tree

pages.text: Summer comes! Bright green leaves dance. Where did Zuri go? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes hiding behind the full, vibrant green summer foliage of the same oak tree, with bright yellow sun and colorful butterflies in summer brights
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo behind lush summer leaves

pages.text: Fall arrives! Orange and red leaves fall down. Peek-a-boo in the leaf pile!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes emerging from a pile of orange, red, and golden autumn leaves beneath the same oak tree, with warm autumn colors all around
illustration.alt: Zuri playing in a pile of colorful autumn leaves

pages.text: Winter is here! White snow covers everything. Peek-a-boo, little snowflake friend!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes standing by the same oak tree now covered in white snow, with cool winter blues and whites, snowflakes gently falling around her
illustration.alt: Zuri in a winter wonderland with the snow-covered oak tree

pages.text: The seasons change, but Zuri and her tree stay together. Peek-a-boo through all the seasons!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes hugging the oak tree trunk, with the tree showing all four seasons in quarters - spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, and winter cool in a magical cyclical display
illustration.alt: Zuri hugging her oak tree showing all four seasons at once

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What color are the spring flowers in Zuri's tree?
questions.explanation: The spring flowers are pink, just like cherry blossoms!

questions.question: What falls from the tree in autumn?
questions.explanation: Orange and red leaves fall from the tree in autumn.

questions.question: What covers everything in winter?
questions.explanation: White snow covers everything in winter, making it look magical!
